task_completion.description: Create a Project Template with the correct name, type, and priority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a project template form or details page showing the Template Name as 'New Branch Office Setup', Type as 'Infrastructure', and Priority as 'High'.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified description for the Project Template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a description text area or field containing exactly: 'Standard template for commissioning IT equipment in new branch locations.'

task_completion.description: Add a milestone to the template with the correct title and status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a milestone section or list within the template displaying the title 'Infrastructure Preparation' with its status set to 'Open'.

task_completion.description: Create a task under the newly created milestone with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a task list specifically nested under or associated with the 'Infrastructure Preparation' milestone showing a task named 'Site Survey and Cabling Check'.

task_completion.description: Set the correct owner and priority for the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the task details, form, or list columns for 'Site Survey and Cabling Check' showing the Owner as 'Administrator' and the Priority as 'Medium'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web-based GUI to create the template.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the service desk application interface, rather than terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data should be entered into the correct input fields, dropdowns, and text areas within the application's template creation workflow, not just typed into a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the task is genuinely nested under the milestone.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI must visually represent the task 'Site Survey and Cabling Check' as a child or sub-item of the 'Infrastructure Preparation' milestone, not just as a standalone task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Template Name: 'New Branch Office Setup'. Expected Template Type: 'Infrastructure'. Expected Template Priority: 'High'. Expected Milestone Title: 'Infrastructure Preparation' (Status: 'Open'). Expected Task Title: 'Site Survey and Cabling Check' (Owner: 'Administrator', Priority: 'Medium').
